name: Turkey Patties Oriental
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients.
2. Form into 4-6 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Saute the burgers for 3 minutes on each side until browned.
5. Mix the Oriental Sauce and pour over the burgers; bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
6. Reduce heat and add celery, onion, and pepper.
7. Simmer, covered, for 6 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Add tomatoes; simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes until the meat is no longer pink.
